ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
ayat.english: Ha. Mim.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
ayat.english: By the Scripture that maketh plain

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَـٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayat.english: Lo! We revealed it on a blessed night - Lo! We are ever warning -

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayat.english: Whereon every wise command is made clear

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayat.english: As a command from Our presence - Lo! We are ever sending -

ayat.arabic_uthmani: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayat.english: A mercy from thy Lord. Lo! He, even He is the Hearer, the Knower,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayat.english: Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, if ye would be sure.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayat.english: There is no Allah save Him. He quickeneth and giveth death; your Lord and Lord of your forefathers.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayat.english: Nay, but they play in doubt.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayat.english: But watch thou (O Muhammad) for the day when the sky will produce visible smoke

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَـٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayat.english: That will envelop the people. This will be a painful torment.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayat.english: (Then they will say): Our Lord relieve us of the torment. Lo! we are believers.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayat.english: How can there be remembrance for them, when a messenger making plain (the Truth) had already come unto them,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayat.english: And they had turned away from him and said: One taught (by others), a madman?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayat.english: Lo! We withdraw the torment a little. Lo! ye return (to disbelief).

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayat.english: On the day when We shall seize them with the greater seizure, (then) in truth We shall punish.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayat.english: And verily We tried before them Pharaoh's folk, when there came unto them a noble messenger,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayat.english: Saying: Give up to me the slaves of Allah. Lo! I am a faithful messenger unto you.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayat.english: And saying: Be not proud against Allah. Lo! I bring you a clear warrant.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
ayat.english: And lo! I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord lest ye stone me to death.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
ayat.english: And if ye put no faith in me, then let me go.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayat.english: And he cried unto his Lord, (saying): These are guilty folk.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayat.english: Then (his Lord commanded): Take away My slaves by night. Lo! ye will be followed,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayat.english: And leave the sea behind at rest, for lo! they are a drowned host.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayat.english: How many were the gardens and the watersprings that they left behind,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayat.english: And the cornlands and the goodly sites

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهِينَ
ayat.english: And pleasant things wherein they took delight!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayat.english: Even so (it was), and We made it an inheritance for other folk;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayat.english: And the heaven and the earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayat.english: And We delivered the Children of Israel from the shameful doom;

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayat.english: (We delivered them) from Pharaoh. Lo! he was a tyrant of the wanton ones.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayat.english: And We chose them, purposely, above (all) creatures.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayat.english: And We gave them portents wherein was a clear trial.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
ayat.english: Lo! these, forsooth, are saying:

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayat.english: There is naught but our first death, and we shall not be raised again.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayat.english: Bring back our fathers, if ye speak the truth!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayat.english: Are they better, or the folk of Tubb'a and those before them? We destroyed them, for surely they were guilty.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ
ayat.english: And We created not the heavens and the earth, and all that is between them, in play.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: مَا خَلَقْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayat.english: We created them not save with truth; but most of them know not.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَـٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayat.english: Assuredly the Day of Decision is the term for all of them,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayat.english: A day when friend can in naught avail friend, nor can they be helped,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayat.english: Save him on whom Allah hath mercy. Lo! He is the Mighty, the Merciful.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayat.english: Lo! the tree of Zaqqum,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
ayat.english: The food of the sinner!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
ayat.english: Like molten brass, it seetheth in their bellies

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayat.english: As the seething of boiling water.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayat.english: (And it will be said): Take him and drag him to the midst of hell,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayat.english: Then pour upon his head the torment of boiling water.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
ayat.english: (Saying): Taste! Lo! thou wast forsooth the mighty, the noble!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayat.english: Lo! this is that whereof ye used to doubt.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
ayat.english: Lo! those who kept their duty will be in a place secured.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayat.english: Amid gardens and watersprings,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
ayat.english: Attired in silk and silk embroidery, facing one another.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayat.english: Even so (it will be). And We shall wed them unto fair ones with wide, lovely eyes.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayat.english: They call therein for every fruit in safety.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayat.english: They taste not death therein, save the first death. And He hath saved them from the doom of hell,

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayat.english: A bounty from thy Lord. That is the supreme triumph.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayat.english: And We have made (this Scripture) easy in thy language only that they may heed.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
ayat.english: Wait then (O Muhammad). Lo! they (too) are waiting.
